description_long: This object is a fantastical, steampunk-inspired airplane with a metallic bronze fuselage and intricate mechanical detailing. Its most striking feature is a pair of large, translucent wings with visible metallic framework, reminiscent of a dragonfly or bat, attached mid-fuselage and extending outward with a slight downward dihedral. The nose is rounded and features a prominent gear-like structure, while the rear includes a mechanical tail with additional fin-like appendages. The body is adorned with gears, rivets, and pipes, suggesting a complex internal mechanism. The cockpit is situated near the front, enclosed, and appears to be a single-seat design with a small canopy.
description: A bronze, steampunk-style airplane with large translucent wings, mechanical details, and a single enclosed cockpit near the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated bronze fuselage, large translucent wings, and mechanical tail details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose, gear-like front structure, and the full wingspan with downward dihedral.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the symmetrical wing and tail design, with visible gears and pipes.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail fin structure, mechanical tail appendages, and the attachment points of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with large, translucent, bat-like wings featuring a slight downward dihedral and visible metallic framework; no winglets or swept geometry.
attribute_engine_type: Single visible piston-style engine integrated into the nose section.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and mechanical fin-like appendages.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear present in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat enclosed cockpit with a small canopy integrated into the fuselage.
